chapter.label: Tale 125
chapter.title: The Beautiful Deed Of Abba Sergios

paragraphs.text: Some of the fathers of Sinai told us this about Abba Sergios the anchorite: When he was living at Sinai, the steward put him in charge of the mules. One day, as he went his way, there was a lion lying in his path, When the mules and the muleteer saw the lion, they were stricken with fear—and they took io their heels. Then Abba Sergios took a holy bread-ration ewlogia out of his pack and went up Lo the lion, saying to it: ‘Take the ration of the fathers and get out of the way, so that we can pass by". The Jion took the ration and went away.
